title: Thank You – Free Trial Promo

content:
Thank you for your interest in our Free Trial Promo!

We will try to get someone to reach out to you within the next business day if possible. We are largely volunteer-run, so if you don’t hear from us, please give us a call as your submission may have slipped through the cracks!

We realize that not everyone is looking to get the same thing out of their squash experience. You might already be a top squash player just looking to get some court time with other good players. You might be new to squash hoping to try a new way to get some exercise. Or maybe you are looking for a social activity to meet new people.

Your free trial can be whatever you want it to be. Access the courts like a regular member (during staffed hours) and play as much as you want. Or we can try to arrange some games for you with some of our members if you don’t have anyone to play with.

If you are looking for more of a squash social group then we can arrange several times to get together with other new players in an informal drop-in setting then we can try to arrange that for you too.
